title: 截图画廊增强
summary: Implementation correctly fulfills all 5 acceptance criteria with comprehensive test coverage (28 tests). Code is clean, follows project conventions (TailwindCSS only, no inline styles), and all 127 tests pass. Minor issues include: inconsistent timestamp formatting between ScreenshotGallery and ScreenshotModal, and potential timezone handling concern in formatTimeShort.

issues.description: Inconsistent timestamp formatting: ScreenshotModal uses toLocaleString() for full date/time, while ScreenshotGallery uses custom HH:mm:ss format. AC5 specifies HH:mm:ss format for the gallery view.
issues.recommendation: Consider extracting formatTimeShort to a shared utility and using it consistently.

issues.description: formatTimeShort uses new Date(timestamp).getHours() which converts to local timezone. If timestamps are stored in UTC (per spec), displayed time may differ from the actual capture time depending on user's timezone.
issues.recommendation: Verify if this is intended behavior. If UTC timestamps should display as local time, this is correct.

issues.description: onUnmounted is imported but not used. Unused imports should be removed.
loadMore uses a 150ms artificial delay for UX feedback. This is acceptable but consider removing it if not needed for perceived responsiveness.
issues.recommendation: Consider whether the delay improves user experience or just adds latency.

strengths: Comprehensive test coverage: 28 tests covering all 5 ACs with edge cases
Clean code structure following Vue 3 composition API patterns
Proper use of TailwindCSS with no inline styles or per-component CSS
Good error handling with try-catch blocks
Pagination correctly resets when filters are applied
Scroll auto-load implemented with proper threshold (100px)
Loading state prevents duplicate loadMore calls
Ellipsis correctly added only when text exceeds 50 characters (AC5)
Timestamp displayed in HH:mm:ss format as specified (AC5)
